title: Foundation and Migration Guardrails

goal: Remove stale branch and repository instructions before contributors begin migration work.

title: Publish structure rules and neutralize old docs
goal: Make the domain-first structure rules override the old mechanism-first guidance.

title: Bootstrap GitHub Actions CI and add early no-new-legacy-files guardrail

title: Create backend skeleton, charters, dependency graph, and route-adapter policy
